handoff_first_extension_v2.definition: Handoff-First Pre-Intake Layer is Odin first orientation layer for every raw input; it creates Handoff Context before Universal Work and ModelWorkPacket creation.
handoff_first_extension_v2.formula: Handoff orients. Universal Work bounds. Odin gates. QIRC coordinates. Apps decide. Models work only as bounded workers.
